headline: Cathie Wood Slams The Brakes — Ark Invest Sits Out As S&P 500 Smashes Records
summary: Ark Invest made no trades in its six main ETFs for two straight days, a rare feat. Here's how the ETFs are performing in 2026.

headline: Australia Agriculture Equipment Market Research Report 2026-2031: John Deere, CNH Industrial, Kubota, and AGCO Dominate the $2.36 Billion Industry
summary: The Australia Agriculture Equipment Market, valued at USD 2.36 billion in 2025, is projected to grow to USD 2.73 billion by 2031 at a CAGR of 2.46%. Key drivers include technological innovation, heightened crop productivity, and increased governmental investments. Challenges stem from tariff impacts, drought conditions, and volatile commodity prices. Dominated by tractors, the market sees significant trends towards electric and alternative-fuel machinery. headline: Deere Repair Settlement Puts Customer Access And Valuation In Focus
summary: Deere (NYSE:DE) has reached a settlement agreement resolving multidistrict right to repair litigation. The settlement includes commitments to expand repair access for customers and independent service providers. The agreement adds provisions for supporting users with repair resources and clarifying Deere's repair policies. For you as an investor following Deere, this development is closely related to how the company manages relationships with farmers, contractors, and dealer networks. Deere...
